SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-04-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF REGINA TALTON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRINCE HALL APARTMENTS IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY NICOLE GILKEY MANAGEMENT AND MICHAEL BROWN OCCUPANT SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT ALLEN COMMUNITY HOUSING INITIATIVE IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS WAIVE ANY SERVICE ISSUES. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TALTON, REGINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PRINCE HALL APARTMENTS ALLEN COMMUNITY HOUSING INITIATIVE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
